body: contChanCutOffMW ${7:5} //MW cutoff to ignore constraints if cont.flow doesn't change from base case more than
contChanCutOffPercent ${8:2} //Rating % cutoff to ignore if cont.flow changes from base case is less than

limitTypeTran ${12:0} //Use AMP (0) or MVA (1) limit to check transformer violation in AC mode
voltMinChange ${13:0.001} //Voltage change cutoff in PU to ignore voltage violations when change from base case is smaller than

maxORAFlowResults ${20:2000000} //Maximum number of ORA or N-1-1 results to report

body: MaxIterLF ${2:50} //Max N of iterations in DC LF
lowVoltCutOffLoad ${5:0.8} //Scale load down if voltage becomes low

maxAngleChangeInit ${7:3} //Max volt angle change in radians per iteration - init stage
maxVoltChangeFinal ${8:0.2} //Max volt magnit change in PU per iteration - final stage
maxAngleChangeFinal ${9:1} //Max volt angle change in radians per iteration - final stage
MemFactor ${11:5} //Sparse methods fill in allocation factor
voltTolnUser ${12:0} //Voltage magnitude tolerance for volt. contr. buses(if 0.00 will be computed automat.)
lowVoltAddQGen ${13:0} //Add Q at generator buses with low voltage(0-no ,1-yes)
lowVoltCutOffQGen ${14:0.7} //Low voltage cutoff to add Qgen if voltage becomes low
highVoltReduceQGen ${15:0} //Reduce Q at generator buses with high voltage below Qmin (0-no,1-yes)
highVoltCutOffQGen ${16:1.3} //High Voltage cutoff to reduce Q gen for high voltage
lowVoltAddShunt ${17:0} //Add Shunts at buses with low voltage(0-no,1-yes )
lowVoltCutOffShunt ${18:0.7} //Low voltage cutoff to add shunts if voltage becomes low
highVoltReduceShunt ${19:1} //Remove fixed Shunt with high voltage(0-no,1-yes )
